ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency representing the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actors_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office performance of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_movie_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., lead, supporting) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_movie_roles_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_movie_roles_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid to the actor */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., advance, full payment, bonus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., best actor, best supporting actor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_performance" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for box office performance record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the movie */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of ticket sales */,
  "box_office_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the movie based on box office performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_performance_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_dates" (
  "release_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release date record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the movie was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released in the region */,
  "release_date_type" TEXT /* Type of release date (e.g., theatrical release, digital release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_dates_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the agency headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "agency_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_awards" (
  "award_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award event */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the award event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the award event took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_awards_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_payment_history" (
  "payment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history record */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid to the actor */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_payment_history_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_payment_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_awards" (
  "movie_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the award event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training or workshop */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "training_cost" REAL /* Cost of the training or workshop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_training_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the movie */,
  "movie_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
